title: CLI /send and DELIVER handlers: duplicated FileHeader + FileChunk dispatch blocks
description: commands.rs contains two near-identical copies of the FileHeader and FileChunk receive dispatch: one in the DELIVER handler (lines ~1230-1276) and one in the SEALED_DELIVER handler (lines ~1439-1503). Approximately 70 lines are duplicated with only cosmetic differences. Both blocks have the same FILE_MAX_CHUNKS constant, same size limit (10 MB), same chunk assembly logic, and same SHA-256 verification. A single handle_file_message(state, transfer_id, ...) helper would eliminate the duplication, reduce maintenance surface, and ensure bug fixes to one path apply to both.
